productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Adi Trefoil Orange Tshirt
description: Composition Orange round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, contrast stitch detailing on the shoulder and graphic print branding Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash No bleaching, dry cleaning Iron with medium heat Combining sport and style is adidas' forte.
